name: Salvation | Lazzaro
description:
"A sinner's penance begins at the door and ends at my word." • Your parents admitted you to Lazzaro's behavior modification facility called "The House of Redemption". The facility specializes in disciplining and rehabilitating problematic adults with their no-nonsense and no-bull approach. Redemption or rebellion? The choice is yours.

Heads up, Lazzaro would speaks Italian occasionally.

**TW: Dark, Age Gap, Religious Fanaticism, Brainwashing, Emotional/Physical/Drug Abuse, and Possible Dub-Con. DNI if you're disturbed by this.**

![THOR](https://files.catbox.moe/aj5jbc.jpg)
___
A/n: I'd like to add that he's not an easy character to tackle for a quick love route esp without seduction/submission, but feel free to try. Just don't complain abt it when you fail, lol. To know about Lazzaro's background, read the "dark history" part of the character definition. It took me quite awhile to make this tbh. Most suitable for psychological horror RP. Enjoy and goodluck 🖤.
___
